title: Eclipse S-CORE - Communication: sample hypervisor transport configuration schema
description: mw::com gateway sample hypervisor transport configuration

hypervisor-socket.title: Socket configuration for hypervisor communication
hypervisor-socket.description: Defines the communication mechanism used between the two gateways.

remote-ip.title: Remote IP address
remote-ip.description: IP address of the remote gateway.

local-port.title: Local port
local-port.description: Local port to listen on for incoming connections.

remote-port.title: Remote port
remote-port.description: Port on the remote gateway to connect to.

request-timeout-ms.title: Request timeout
request-timeout-ms.description: Timeout in milliseconds for request-response round-trips.
